entries.title: Phase 3 build day
entries.body: Wired the Jarvis voice interface end-to-end with Web Speech API and wake-word detection. Stood up six agent control rooms with live data feeds, added SmartBites monitoring to Mission Control, and shipped the Goals / Memory / Journal / Settings system pages.

entries.title: Gateway hardening
entries.body: Reviewed ngrok tunnel stability for the OpenClaw gateway and dashboard. Confirmed auth-header injection works through the bridge and device pairing flows are stable for external access.

entries.title: SmartBites momentum
entries.body: Indexed another batch of restaurant menus and pushed allergen tagging improvements. Beta cohort feedback is positive on the allergy-aware menu flow. Prepping for the next onboarding wave.
